title: selaginella sambiranensis
intro: Selaginella sambiranensis, also known as the Madagascar rose moss or Sambirano spike moss, is a species of flowering plant in the family Selaginellaceae, characterized by its delicate, rose-pink inflorescences. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Selaginella sambiranensis include potential anti-aging effects, improved cardiovascular health, and reduced inflammation, making it a popular choice in traditional medicine. In terms of herbal preparations, Selaginella sambiranensis is often used in teas, infusions, and capsules, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects on human health.
